<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Organograma — INFO+ Telecom</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#ffffff;--bg2:#f5f5f3;--bg3:#eeecea;
  --text:#1a1a18;--text2:#5f5e5a;--text3:#888780;
  --border:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);--border2:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  --blue50:#E6F1FB;--blue600:#185FA5;--blue800:#0C447C;
  --purple50:#EEEDFE;--purple600:#534AB7;--purple800:#3C3489;
  --teal50:#E1F5EE;--teal600:#0F6E56;--teal800:#085041;--teal400:#1D9E75;
}
@media(prefers-color-scheme:dark){:root{
  --bg:#1e1e1c;--bg2:#2a2a28;--bg3:#323230;
  --text:#e8e6de;--text2:#a8a69e;--text3:#6e6c66;
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);--border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  --blue50:#0c2a45;--blue600:#378ADD;--blue800:#85B7EB;
  --purple50:#1e1a40;--purple600:#7F77DD;--purple800:#AFA9EC;
  --teal50:#072b20;--teal600:#1D9E75;--teal800:#5DCAA5;--teal400:#5DCAA5;
}}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;padding:0}
.header{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:20px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px}
.logo{height:40px;display:block}
.logo-dark{display:none}
@media(prefers-color-scheme:dark){.logo-light{display:none}.logo-dark{display:block}}
.header-text h1{font-size:17px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.header-text p{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
.container{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 20px}
.level-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.7px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px}
.row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:4px}
.vline{width:1px;height:18px;background:var(--border2);margin:0 auto}
.hline{height:1px;background:var(--border2);width:60%;margin:0 auto}
.connector{margin:2px auto}
.card{border-radius:10px;border:.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);padding:10px 14px;text-align:center}
.card.dir{border-top:3px solid var(--blue600);background:var(--blue50);min-width:150px}
.card.dir .cn{color:var(--blue800);font-weight:500;font-size:12px}
.card.dir .cr{color:var(--blue600);font-size:11px;margin-top:3px}
.card.ger{border-top:3px solid var(--purple600);background:var(--purple50);min-width:210px}
.card.ger .cn{color:var(--purple800);font-weight:500;font-size:14px}
.card.ger .cr{color:var(--purple600);font-size:11px;margin-top:3px}
.card.sup{cursor:pointer;border-top:3px solid var(--teal600);background:var(--bg2);transition:background .15s,transform .1s;min-width:160px}
.card.sup:hover{background:var(--bg);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.card.sup.active{background:var(--teal50)}
.card.sup .cn{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;font-size:12px}
.card.sup .cr{color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;margin-top:3px}
.card.sup .co{color:var(--teal600);font-size:10px;margin-top:3px;font-weight:600}
.badge{display:inline-block;background:var(--teal50);color:var(--teal800);font-size:10px;font-weight:500;border-radius:20px;padding:2px 8px;margin-top:6px;border:.5px solid var(--border)}
.chevron{display:inline-block;transition:transform .2s;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-left:4px}
.chevron.open{transform:rotate(180deg)}
.panel{margin:14px 0 6px;border-radius:12px;border:.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);overflow:hidden}
.panel-head{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--bg2)}
.panel-head .ph{font-weight:500;font-size:13px;color:var(--text)}
.panel-head .pc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)}
.panel-body{padding:16px 18px}
.group-title{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--text3);margin:14px 0 7px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:.5px solid var(--border)}
.group-title:first-child{margin-top:0}
.members{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px}
.member{background:var(--bg2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;min-width:160px;flex:1;border:.5px solid var(--border)}
.mn{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.mr{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}
.mc{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
.sep{margin:24px 0;border:none;border-top:.5px solid var(--border)}
.direct-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px}
.direct-card{background:var(--bg2);border:.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;text-align:center;min-width:170px}
.direct-card .cn{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.direct-card .cr{font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px}
.footer{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);padding:24px;border-top:.5px solid var(--border);margin-top:32px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="header">
  <img class="logo logo-light" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="INFO+ Telecom">
  <img class="logo logo-dark" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="INFO+ Telecom">
  <div class="header-text">
    <h1>Organograma Hierárquico</h1>
    <p>INFO+ Telecom · 36 colaboradores · 5 cidades</p>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="container">
  <div class="level-label">Diretoria</div>
  <div class="row">
    <div class="card dir"><div class="cn">André Luis de Araujo</div><div class="cr">Redes Lógicas / Links / Provedores</div></div>
    <div class="card dir"><div class="cn">Bruno G. Escorsin</div><div class="cr">RH / Comercial / SAC / Frotas</div></div>
    <div class="card dir"><div class="cn">Orlando R. de Oliveira Jr.</div><div class="cr">Técnicos / NOC / Servidores</div></div>
    <div class="card dir"><div class="cn">Felipe Marques Scarelli</div><div class="cr">Financeiro / Comercial</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="connector"><div class="vline"></div><div class="hline"></div><div class="vline"></div></div>
  <div class="level-label">Gerência Geral</div>
  <div class="row">
    <div class="card ger"><div class="cn">Júnior César de Faria</div><div class="cr">Gerente Geral · desde mar/2017</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="connector"><div class="vline"></div><div class="hline"></div><div class="vline"></div></div>
  <div class="level-label">Supervisores — clique para ver a equipe</div>
  <div class="row" id="sup-row"></div>
  <div id="panel-area"></div>
  <hr class="sep">
  <div class="level-label">Reportam diretamente a Júnior e Bruno</div>
  <div class="direct-row">
    <div class="direct-card"><div class="cn">Luciana Brenda Garcia</div><div class="cr">Supervisor de Vendas</div></div>
    <div class="direct-card"><div class="cn">Welington Luiz Ferreira</div><div class="cr">Frotas e Auxiliar Geral</div></div>
    <div class="direct-card"><div class="cn">Marco Antonio do Amaral</div><div class="cr">Agendamento</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="footer">
  INFO+ Telecom · Organograma gerado em March/2026<br>
  <em style="font-size: 12px; margin-top: 8px; display: block;">
    Organograma desenvolvido e dedicado a Júnior César de Faria
  </em>
</div>
<script>
const sups=[
  {id:'gabriel',name:'Gabriel Camargo da Luz',role:'Sup. Técnicos FTTH / NOC',co:'co-resp.: Orlando',count:14,groups:[
    {t:'Auxiliar de supervisão',m:[{n:'Pedro Lucio Novais dos Santos',r:'Aux. Supervisão FTTH/NOC',c:'Carlópolis'}]},
    {t:'Técnicos FTTH',m:[
      {n:'Roberto Carlos Leite Jr.',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Alessandro Alvez Campos',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Arapoti'},
      {n:'Vagner Rodrigues',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Fartura'},
      {n:'Alex Donato da Silva',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Fartura'},
      {n:'Douglas William Pedroso',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Fartura'},
      {n:'Gabriel Narciso Santos',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Jose Felipe Rocha de Souza',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Carlos Matheus V. Martins',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Arapoti'},
      {n:'Rogério Rodrigues',r:'Técnico FTTH',c:'Joaquim Távora'},
    ]},
    {t:'Técnicos de Infraestrutura',m:[
      {n:'Marcio Batista',r:'Técnico Infra',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Daniel Augusto do Prado',r:'Técnico Infra',c:'Fartura'},
      {n:'Jhonatan A. Rocha de Souza',r:'Técnico Infra',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Fábio de Souza Gabriel',r:'Técnico Infra',c:'Carlópolis'},
    ]},
  ]},
  {id:'luidialan',name:'Luidialan M. Antunes',role:'Sup. SAC / Atendimento',co:'co-resp.: Bruno',count:9,groups:[
    {t:'Técnicos Remotos SAC',m:[
      {n:'Carlos Eduardo M. Rodrigues',r:'Técnico Remoto SAC',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'José Vinicius F. Cardoso',r:'Técnico Remoto SAC',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'João Pedro C. Oliveira',r:'Técnico Remoto SAC',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Fabio Yojiro Tashima',r:'Técnico Remoto SAC',c:'Carlópolis'},
    ]},
    {t:'Atendentes de Loja',m:[
      {n:'Maria Laura P. Palma',r:'Atendente Loja',c:'Fartura'},
      {n:'Poliana G. R. de Azevedo',r:'Atendente Loja',c:'Arapoti'},
      {n:'Gabriela Piovesam Bomfim',r:'Atendente Loja',c:'Taguaí'},
      {n:'Ana Luisa Oliveira Santos',r:'Atendente Loja',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Ana Claudia da Silva',r:'Atendente Loja',c:'Joaquim Távora'},
    ]},
  ]},
  {id:'natalia',name:'Natália C. dos Santos',role:'Sup. RH e Financeiro',co:'co-resp.: Bruno / Felipe',count:1,groups:[
    {t:'Equipe',m:[{n:'Pâmela Conick Ramos',r:'Aux. Cobrança / RH / Financeiro',c:'Carlópolis'}]},
  ]},
  {id:'daiane',name:'Daiane Garcia de Oliveira',role:'Sup. Cobrança',co:'co-resp.: Bruno / Felipe',count:2,groups:[
    {t:'Equipe',m:[
      {n:'Helen Tawana Deus Oliveira',r:'Aux. de Cobrança',c:'Carlópolis'},
      {n:'Pâmela Conick Ramos',r:'Aux. Cobrança / RH / Financeiro',c:'Carlópolis'},
    ]},
  ]},
  {id:'douglas',name:'Douglas S. Sdrubolini',role:'Sup. de Estoque',co:'co-resp.: Felipe',count:1,groups:[
    {t:'Equipe',m:[{n:'Uziel Bento da Cruz',r:'Aux. de Estoque',c:'Carlópolis'}]},
  ]},
  {id:'rennan',name:'Rennan Jose da Silva',role:'Sup. de Redes',co:'co-resp.: André',count:0,groups:[]},
];
let active=null;
const row=document.getElementById('sup-row');
const area=document.getElementById('panel-area');
sups.forEach(s=>{
  const d=document.createElement('div');
  d.className='card sup';
  d.id='c-'+s.id;
  d.innerHTML='<div class="cn">'+s.name+'<span class="chevron" id="chev-'+s.id+'">▾</span></div><div class="cr">'+s.role+'</div><div class="co">'+s.co+'</div><div class="badge">'+s.count+' colaborador'+(s.count!==1?'es':'')+'</div>';
  d.onclick=()=>toggle(s);
  row.appendChild(d);
});
function toggle(s){
  const card=document.getElementById('c-'+s.id);
  const chev=document.getElementById('chev-'+s.id);
  if(active===s.id){card.classList.remove('active');chev.classList.remove('open');area.innerHTML='';active=null;return;}
  if(active){document.getElementById('c-'+active)?.classList.remove('active');document.getElementById('chev-'+active)?.classList.remove('open');}
  active=s.id;card.classList.add('active');chev.classList.add('open');
  const total=s.groups.reduce((a,g)=>a+g.m.length,0);
  let html='<div class="panel"><div class="panel-head"><span class="ph">Equipe de '+s.name+'</span><span class="pc">'+total+' colaborador'+(total!==1?'es':'')+'</span></div><div class="panel-body">';
  if(total===0){html+='<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic">Sem equipe direta cadastrada</span>';}
  s.groups.forEach(g=>{
    html+='<div class="group-title">'+g.t+'</div><div class="members">';
    g.m.forEach(m=>{html+='<div class="member"><div class="mn">'+m.n+'</div><div class="mr">'+m.r+'</div>'+(m.c?'<div class="mc">'+m.c+'</div>':'')+'</div>';});
    html+='</div>';
  });
  html+='</div></div>';
  area.innerHTML=html;
  area.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'nearest'});
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
